headline: Pervis Estupiñán
body: 🚨🟣🔵 Understand Aston Villa have agreed personal terms with Pervis Estupiñán who wants the move to AVFC. Negotiations continue with AC Milan to agree on the fee as Unai Emery wants Pervis as replacement for Lucas Digne.
raw_text:
🚨🟣🔵 Understand Aston Villa have agreed personal terms with Pervis Estupiñán who wants the move to #AVFC.

Negotiations continue with AC Milan to agree on the fee as Unai Emery wants Pervis as replacement for Lucas Digne.
text:
🚨🟣🔵 Understand Aston Villa have agreed personal terms with Pervis Estupiñán who wants the move to #AVFC.

Negotiations continue with AC Milan to agree on the fee as Unai Emery wants Pervis as replacement for Lucas Digne.
draft_caption:
